prestazioni: SR20DE (2.0L 16V DOHC) engine swap with a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and Tomei Type-R valve springs to handle 9,000 RPM redline, paired with a HKS Super Power Flow exhaust manifold and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a Fujitsubo GSpec muffler for optimal scavenging

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.86 A/R turbine housing) with a custom top-mount intercooler setup using a GReddy Type-S intercooler core (600x300x76mm) and a HKS SSQV blow-off valve, mated to a Nismo 550cc/min fuel injector kit and a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump, controlled by a Haltech Elite 1500 ECU with a custom 3D-printed intake manifold for equal-length runners

Nismo 4.1:1 final drive ratio with a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in a reinforced P10 transmission housing, paired with a Nismo twin-plate clutch and lightweight flywheel (8.5kg), with custom polyurethane engine mounts (Energy Suspension) to reduce drivetrain loss
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (P10-specific) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser, featuring a 30mm extended overfenders to accommodate 9.5J ET15 Work Meister S1 3P wheels (17x9.5 front, 17x10.5 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/45/17 and 255/40/17 tires

Custom rear wing based on the Nissan R33 GT-R N1-spec wing (carbon fiber, 1,400mm width) mounted on a custom aluminum pedestal with adjustable angle (0-15°), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (P10-specific, 3kg weight reduction) featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (SR20DE-specific mounting brackets), a Nismo 350mm steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 6-point) painted in Nissan Racing Yellow (code: 407), with a full Alcantara headliner and door cards (custom stitched by Status Racing)
